title: Join our mega productivity event with industry experts

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you joining us next week at our mega productivity event?!

On August 7th, our community is gathering in the monday mansion to explore new methods to improve productivity?

In case you missed it, award-winning change management researcher, Katy Milkman will join our community on monday mansions to share her award-winning research on adapting and flourishing in our dynamic era. But there is more; our event will have different opportunities to dive deep into your individual and team productivity.

MEGA event invites - social post2 (1)1620×1620 170 KB

Here is the agenda:

  • We will start off with an engaging session by Harel Shaked the director of IT Services and Support at Outbrain. Harel will give insights on driving productivity from the individual to the team level.
  • We will then have a short break for you to explore our multi-media, monday mansion booths to uncover new community resources and mingle with productivity enthusiasts worldwide.
  • Last, but not least, Katy Milkman, podcast host, author, and award-winning behavioral economist, will share strategies and tips for achieving long-term success within your teams.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this one gonna be live Broadcast?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Live! Join us

posts.author: elprush (Elena Rush)
posts.cookedHtml: When will we receive the link to participate?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: We will be sending out the email tomorrow morning with the link as well as update the invite! Make sure to check and if you still do not have it let me know!

posts.author: iziel (Iziel)
posts.cookedHtml: Will there be a recorded video that will be sent out?
